Alright, Nitty. As you, I'm sure, saw in Facebook what they made yesterday, we are moving away from the group coaching, group training model into what's called a hybrid program. And so I want to explain what that means for you guys. And I'll explain, you kind of take you to the same epiphanies that I had that led me to this decision. I believe it's wrong. It's wrong because, no, that's not to say that I don't think you guys should work out. And I love them for that. I'm glad that I can help them get to that point in their life. But I can no longer offer that as a service as a part of my business because that's not appropriate to my mission to what I want to do. And it's not serving the people that trust me the best way. What are you going to do? I didn't see the problem. We starting June 1st, we will no longer offer group classes in any setting as far as what we're doing now. That makes sense.
